name: Trotters Runtime
description: Supervisor tools for the Trotters research runtime.

apiBase.label: Research API Base
apiBase.help: Base URL for the internal runtime control API.

opsBridgeBase.label: Ops Bridge Base
opsBridgeBase.help: Base URL for the internal service-restart bridge.

runbookPath.label: Runbook Path
runbookPath.help: Path to the curated supervisor runbook JSON file.

runbookHistoryPath.label: Runbook History Path
runbookHistoryPath.help: JSONL history file for recorded recoveries and escalations.

catalogRoot.label: Catalog Root
catalogRoot.help: Root directory for exported research catalog artifacts.

summaryRoot.label: Summary Root
summaryRoot.help: Directory where low-cost agent summary artifacts are written.

actor.label: Actor Header
actor.help: Actor value sent in X-Trotters-Actor for audit logging.

defaultLogTailLines.label: Default Log Tail
defaultLogTailLines.help: Default stderr/stdout tail size for job log inspection.
